articles.title: Welcome to The North Stand
articles.author: Alfie
articles.excerpt: My name is Alfie. This is why I built this site.

body.text: I'm Alfie. I first came across Icelandic Football after the national team produced one of the worst days in my own nation's (England) footballing history during Euro 2026 What followed was Gylfi Sigurdsson becoming my club's record signing, and a holiday to Iceland in 2025 only strengthened my connection to this wonderful island in the North Atlantic. When I came home and tried to follow the Besta deild karla properly, I couldn't find anywhere in English that covered it well. That's the gap this site exists to fill.
The North Stand covers Icelandic football's top flight — fixtures, results, tables, club histories, and written pieces about the league and the clubs within it. Nothing more complicated than that.
The 2026 season starts in April. I will be covering the action as it happens. Let's get into it.
